modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty completing the Grad PLUS Master Promissory Note (MPN)

full_description_text:  
User is trying to complete the Grad PLUS MPN.  
They are unsure how to finish the process.  
This is related to their financial aid and FAFSA.  
Need guidance on the steps to complete it.
